goal: Найти и валидировать новые cross-symbol directional features и CatBoost long/short классификаторы, сравнить их с immutable baseline active-signal-v1@1 через matched OOS.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 — immutable reference; never modify base, its thresholds, hours, days, execution, or feature set
No feature/target/threshold/architecture selection based on lockbox window — lockbox only validates frozen choices
All improvements must pass matched OOS comparison with base on the same window
Classification only — no regression on raw future PnL
Separate long and short classifiers first; no multiclass or router model at start (router only if both M1 and M2 show meaningful OOS value)
Maximum 3-4 strong feature families; no wide feature inflation
Compact disciplined HPO grid only: depth {4,6,8}, lr {0.03,0.05}, moderate regularization, 2-3 seeds max
Allowed horizons: 12h, 18h only; allowed barrier schemes: balanced, conservative only
Purge gap between train and later windows: minimum 24h
Thresholds must be frozen on selection OOS before lockbox is opened
Train/selection/lockbox windows must be frozen before any model training begins

stages.title: Start v6 and fix new model discipline
stages.objective: Open a new research project for v6 and formally record the classification-first methodology, immutable baseline reference, and anti-leakage rules.
actions: Create new research_project for v6 cycle
Record why v5 regression route failed and why v6 uses classification
Record why a new information layer (cross-symbol) is mandatory
Fix immutable baseline reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m
Define research_map axes: branch, feature_family, side, label_scheme, model_stage, final_decision
Record anti-leakage and anti-regression-repeat rules
success_criteria: New project exists with immutable reference and frozen v6 rules documented

stages.title: Data readiness for new information layer
stages.objective: Verify that 1h datasets for cross-symbol and breadth features are available and of sufficient quality.
actions: Check 1h dataset readiness for BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT minimum
Check SOLUSDT and BNBUSDT availability if possible; shrink universe if needed but do not break discipline
Verify funding and expiry event data availability
Freeze final symbol universe for v6
success_criteria: Frozen symbol universe defined; clear which cross-symbol features are buildable

stages.title: Feature contract and materialization for v6 feature packs
stages.objective: Build and validate the new directional feature layer across all four feature packs (leadership-breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, hybrid-event).
actions: For each feature in Pack 1 (leadership-breadth, 8 features): write contract, validate, publish, materialize, inspect coverage, verify causality
For each feature in Pack 2 (path-asymmetry, 7 features): write contract, validate, publish, materialize, inspect coverage, verify causality
For each feature in Pack 3 (regime-disagreement, 5 features): write contract, validate, publish, materialize, inspect coverage, verify causality
For each feature in Pack 4 (hybrid-event, 4 features): write contract, validate, publish, materialize, inspect coverage, verify causality
Compute common_model_window across all materialized features
Verify no leakage detected and all features are deployable to runtime
success_criteria: All feature packs materialized with validated contracts
common_model_window defined with total active columns and cross-symbol columns counted
No leakage detected; features causally sound

stages.title: Dataset contract and label design without leakage
stages.objective: Freeze train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS windows and define barrier-based long/short labels before any model training.
actions: Determine common coverage window based on cross-symbol feature availability
Freeze train_window, selection_oos_window, lockbox_oos_window with purge_gap >= 24h
Define balanced and conservative barrier-based labels for long and short sides
Constrain horizons to 12h and 18h only
Build two dataset surfaces: full surface and base-absent surface
Record that selection OOS selects feature pack / horizon / threshold; lockbox only validates frozen choices
success_criteria: Dataset splits and labels completely frozen and documented

stages.title: Fast plausibility check of feature packs
stages.objective: Filter out unpromising feature packs with lightweight models before full training; keep max 2 pack setups per side.
actions: For each feature pack: train minimal long-classifier and short-classifier
Evaluate ranking value on selection OOS for each pack
Check economic plausibility of top-decile/top-bucket predictions
Shortlist max 2 pack setups for long and max 2 pack setups for short for full training
success_criteria: Shortlist of max 4 setups (2 long + 2 short) promoted to full training

stages.title: Train CatBoost long/short classifiers
stages.objective: Train disciplined candidate CatBoost classification models on the shortlisted setups with frozen hyperparameter grid.
actions: Train M1_long_A (and optionally M1_long_B) with frozen params: depth {4,6,8}, lr {0.03,0.05}, moderate regularization
Train M2_short_A (and optionally M2_short_B) with same disciplined grid
Apply early stopping, class weights, calibration sanity check
Record feature importance and SHAP summary for each model
Freeze model cards: feature pack, label scheme, horizon, params, best iteration, selection OOS quality
Optionally train M3/M4 weak-window classifiers only if standard models show recoverable weak pockets
success_criteria: Frozen long and short model candidates with documented model cards ready for sleeve construction

stages.title: Convert models into tradeable sleeves
stages.objective: Transform classification probabilities into concrete long/short trading sleeves with frozen thresholds.
actions: Extract p_long_success and p_short_success from frozen models
On selection OOS, choose up to 3 threshold tiers: conservative, balanced, aggressive
Freeze final thresholds before opening lockbox
Construct v6-long-balanced and v6-short-balanced sleeves
success_criteria: Tradeable sleeves defined with frozen thresholds ready for OOS backtest

stages.title: Matched OOS comparison against baseline
stages.objective: Run sleeves and baseline on identical OOS windows and compare via strict additive, permissive, and standalone metrics.
actions: Run each sleeve standalone on selection OOS (sanity check)
Run each sleeve standalone on lockbox OOS (primary test)
Run strict additive integration (base + model) on lockbox OOS (main criterion)
Run permissive integration on lockbox OOS (diagnostic only)
Run immutable baseline separately on selection OOS and lockbox OOS for matched comparison
success_criteria: Matched OOS comparison table complete: base standalone, model standalone, base+model on same windows

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization and proof of new entries
stages.objective: Prove that each sleeve adds genuinely new profitable trades rather than replacing or cannibalizing baseline entries.
actions: Compute overlap rate between sleeve trades and baseline trades
Count truly new trades and replaced baseline trades
Evaluate PnL of new trades specifically
Compute ownership metric (share of profit attributable to new model entries)
Check weak-window repair effect if applicable
Assign terminal decision per sleeve: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST, or REJECT
success_criteria: Every best sleeve has a terminal decision with supporting ownership and cannibalization metrics

stages.title: Final verdict on v6
stages.objective: Render a single consolidated verdict on the v6 model route: Success, Partial, or Failed.
actions: Summarize what v6 aimed to achieve
Document what was actually done
State main conclusion from OOS and ownership analysis
Record v1-v6 cumulative outcome table
If Success: prepare promoted sleeves for runtime deployment
If Partial: document watchlist items and conditions for future revisit
If Failed: record why the cross-symbol + classification route was exhausted and what comes next
success_criteria: Unified v6 final report written with verdict, cumulative v1-v6 table, and next-steps recommendation

warnings: Plan is in Russian; stage titles and objectives translated to English for semantic consistency
M3/M4 weak-window models gated — only permitted if standard long/short classifiers show weak but recoverable pockets
Router model explicitly forbidden at v6 start; only unlocked by conditional gate after M1+M2 success
